---
output: github_document
---

<!-- README.md is generated from README.Rmd. Please edit that file -->

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>",
  fig.path = "man/figures/README-",
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

# neoipcr - The R Package to Work With NeoIPC Data

<!-- badges: start -->

[![Codecov test coverage](https://codecov.io/gh/NeoIPC/neoipcr/graph/badge.svg)](https://app.codecov.io/gh/NeoIPC/neoipcr)

<!-- badges: end -->

The goal of neoipcr is to facilitate working with data from the NeoIPC project

## Installation

You can install the development version of neoipcr from [GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("pak")
pak::pak("NeoIPC/neoipcr")
```

## Importing Data From DHIS2

To import data from the NeoIPC surveillance DHIS2 server use import_dhis2().

```{r example}
library(neoipcr)

data <- import_dhis2()
```
